calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Peter Liederman, Esq., for Plaintiff: Capital One Bank.
No appearance by the Defendant: Maria C. Krystal.
09:45 am. - Counsel move to strike Defendant's Answer is Denied.
The Court hears the testimony, considered the declaration and evidence, grants judgment as follows: Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against Defendant,
Principal in the amount of $1,862.98
Interest $118.92
Attorney's Fees $450.00
Costs $160.30
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

May 3, 2004
Judgment received in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Set For Trial On Jan-26-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
